items.title: Digital Payment Update - QR Code Payment Market Growth Fueled By Smartphone Use
items.description: The global QR Code Payment Market is projected to reach USD 61.73 billion by 2033, growing at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 20% from 2025 to 2033, fueled by increasing smartphone use and a heightened demand for contactless payments. This surge is led primarily by the Asia Pacific region, where the adoption of QR payment solutions is particularly strong. QR code payment methods, known for their speed, versatility, and security compared to traditional methods, are gaining prominence...
